**Darwin Nightly Run — 2026-03-05 02:00 CET**

**Sessions scanned:** 9 | **Facts added:** 20 | **Facts skipped:** 5 (duplicates)

**Biggest find tonight — PAMLS project:** thread:1864 (new session) revealed the full stack of the main product GENI.SI d.o.o. builds for Bank of Slovenia: an AML/CFT supervision platform (RAT + SCT modules) running on Podman/Neo4j/Oracle across BSPAMLST + BSPAMLSP servers. Luka Stopar is director of GENI.SI.

**ATVP project confirmed real:** Iztok Renčelj (EdgeTech) is involved; Gregor Nastran is the ATVP contact. EdgeTech is building an AI supervision system for the Slovenian Securities Market Agency.

**Other facts added:** Luka's Mac hostname (`triglav`), GitHub account (`lstopar`), OpenRouter EU VAT starting Mar 6. Darwin's `tools.sessions.visibility = "all"` config formally confirmed.

**Note:** Gemini embedding API still returning 404 — semantic search offline; exact lookups and inserts are working fine. Two merge candidates flagged: `ATVP` / `ATVP (Agencija za trg vrednostnih papirjev)` and `GENI.SI` / `GENI.SI d.o.o.` — will resolve when embeddings recover.
